summary.intent: Review and address new comments on PR #479 in the moltis repo, fixing issues and resolving review conversations.
summary.outcome: Fixed a Docker layer dependency issue by adding `install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings` to the NodeSource layer, updated docs/src/mcp.md, committed and pushed changes.

repo: The moltis repo uses worktrees at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/
PR reviews are on github.com/moltis-org/moltis — the org name is moltis-org
Docker layers should be self-contained; the keyrings directory creation should not rely on another layer (Docker CLI) to create it first

code.finding: MCP documentation was updated as part of PR #479 review feedback

workflow: Unresolved review threads are fetched programmatically via Bash before addressing them
Each review conversation is resolved after the corresponding fix is applied

friction: Docker layer ordering created an implicit dependency: the keyrings directory was being created by the Docker CLI layer rather than the NodeSource layer that actually needs it
